message.content:
@startuml
title Search for Products by ID (using DB dao)

actor User
participant Administration
participant MainMenu
participant ProductReportDialog
participant ProductDatabaseDAO
participant Database

Administration <<main>>
MainMenu <<frame>>
ProductReportDialog <<dialog>>
ProductDatabaseDAO <<ProductDAO>>

Administration -> MainMenu: clicks 'View Products'
MainMenu -> ProductReportDialog: <<construct>>
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO: <<construct>>
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO: getProducts()
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Database: select * from product
Database -> ProductDatabaseDAO: ResultSet
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Database: reconstruct products from ResultSet
ProductDatabaseDAO -> ProductReportDialog: products
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO: <<construct>>
ProductReportDialog -> SimpleListModel:model: <<construct>>
ProductReportDialog -> SimpleListModel:model: updateItems(products)
ProductReportDialog -> ProductReportDialog: products now visible to user
ProductReportDialog -> ProductReportDialog: IstProducts.setModel(model)
User -> ProductReportDialog: enters product id into search bar
ProductReportDialog -> ProductReportDialog: txtId.getText : id
User -> ProductReportDialog: clicks "Search"
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO: search(id)
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Database: select * from product where product_id = id
Database -> ProductDatabaseDAO: product
ProductDatabaseDAO -> ProductReportDialog: updateItems(product)
ProductReportDialog -> ProductReportDialog: IstProducts.getModel(model)
ProductReportDialog -> ProductReportDialog: only searched product now visible to user

@enduml
